parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The ID of the folder in Drive

parameters.name: appendSASToken
parameters.description: Set this to false to exclude appending SAS token for images/files

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: Specify the page to retrieve. Page numbers are zero-based. Therefore, to retrieve the 10th page, you need to set page=9

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: The number of results per page
